actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Facility A-13 went dark six hours ago. This corridor is your first live sector.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Sweep the access corridor and recover any surviving logs before local systems collapse.

OPS LOG 04
Power loss started in the maintenance wing, then moved against cable direction.
Security sealed Sector C after staff reported chanting inside locked rooms.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Corridor secure. The blackout did not stop the transmissions.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Advance to the service run. If the logs are right, the facility was sealing something in, not keeping us out.
